title: quercus rotundifolia var. avellaniformis
intro: Quercus rotundifolia var. avellaniformis, also known as the Holm oak, is a variety of the Quercus rotundifolia species, a type of evergreen tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus rotundifolia var. avellaniformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
